message:

+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current valkey setup",
+        "description": "Verify your valkey version and configuration:\n```bash\nvalkey-server --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working valkey installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review valkey configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant valkey configuration:\nDear friends,\n\nsorry to bother you with this request, but the copyright setups I reached in the past with Redis Ltd demands some change.\nYears ago, I sold the copyright of the Redis source code, the brand and the logo to Redis Ltd."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [LEGAL] Please remove my copyright notice from the source…",
+        "description": "Hi Viktor!\n\n> The other change (mostly completed now) is to get rid of the Redis trademark everywhere. :)\n\nIndeed, this step was somewhat more obvious, the copyright things are a bit more complex sometimes when liberal licenses apply, since the licensing terms even when very liberal still don't override the copyright matters. Also while hacking I was focused on other stuff, and the exact dates of the contracts where regulated in peculiar ways so I totally forgot to update the copyright notice\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"[LEGAL] Please remove my copyright notice from the source…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],

+      "summary": "Hi Viktor!\n\n> The other change (mostly completed now) is to get rid of the Redis trademark everywhere. :)\n\nIndeed, this step was somewhat more obvious, the copyright things are a bit more complex sometimes when liberal licenses apply, since the licensing terms even when very liberal still don't override the copyright matters.",
